smoke_notes.summarize_function: _summarize was monkey-patched (try/finally restore in test-spec.md) in T04..T07b to avoid real claude -p cost; the surrounding orchestration (_extract_history, _trim_to_max_input_bytes, _build_prompt_prefix, _build_compaction_notice) was exercised end-to-end.
smoke_notes.discord_bot_import: T07c (round 2 拡張) では discord モジュールを最小スタブ化（HTTPException / Forbidden / Intents / Client / DMChannel / Thread / Message のダミー型）して bot.py を実 import し、_run_with_resume を実モジュール経路で smoke 実行した。claude_runner.run と compaction.run_compaction と bot.store を monkey patch して「初回失敗 + 旧 sid retry 成功」シナリオを再現し、notice_text に『新セッション起動に失敗』が含まれ result.text が retry 応答であることを実コードで検証済み。
smoke_notes.skipped_realdiscord: T06e/T11/T13b require a running Discord bot (production venv with discord.py + DISCORD_TOKEN). They MUST be performed manually by the operator after deployment, using HERMES_COMPACTION_TOKEN_THRESHOLD=2000 (temporarily lowered) to force a compaction event within a single Discord conversation. Acceptance: (1) compaction notice appears as a separate line before the main reply; (2) next message after notice references the prior conversation context (proves `--resume <new_sid>` carries the user-prompt-embedded summary); (3) two near-simultaneous messages in the same scope_key are serialized via the existing asyncio.Lock.
smoke_notes.skipped_realclaude: T09 requires a real CLAUDE_BIN invocation to verify the tempdir cwd actually isolates ~/.claude/projects/ entries. Static review confirms _summarize uses tempfile.mkdtemp() + shutil.rmtree in try/finally. Operator should run one real compaction with sonnet and verify that no new jsonl appears under ~/.claude/projects/-home-shohei-hermes-lite/ from the summarizer call.
smoke_notes.project_type_policy: project_type=jobs per .claude/gloop-config.json: automated test framework introduction is out of scope (rejection.md Loop 1+2+3). Manual checklist in test-spec.md is the authoritative receive-channel. Real-Discord/Real-claude T-IDs are tracked as `skip_*_followup` to make explicit they remain on the operator's post-merge checklist.
